LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Represents a high score entry in the Hungry Dragon game.

netId.description: The Cornell NetID of the player

score.description: The score achieved by the player.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the score was achieved.

leaderboard/{entryId}.description: Stores user scores for the Hungry Dragon mini-game.
